effects_provenance.raw: Candy Chrome THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Candy Chrome THCA Flower is a decadent hybrid that fuses candy-like sweetness with a sleek, gassy finish. The cultivar produces dense, well-structured buds with a vibrant layered aromatic profile bursting with sugary fruit, ripe berries, and creamy vanilla glaze balanced by subtle notes of fuel and spice. Effects Candy Chrome delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of contrasting character that distinguishes candy-meets-gas hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet fruit candy up front, with creamy vanilla glaze through the middle and a smooth gas-spice finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably layered. The terpene profile reads candy-vanilla-and-gas — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Candy Chrome harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Candy Chrome THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Candy Chrome THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: Bangkok Purple THCA Flower Supreme / 3.5g Strain Profile Bangkok Purple THCA Flower is an exclusive sativa-dominant hybrid built on Thai heritage genetics . The cultivar delivers stunning visual character — deep purple expression accented by trichome coverage — paired with a vibrant, multi-note aromatic profile that distinguishes it from typical fruit hybrids. Effects Bangkok Purple delivers an energizing, invigorating cerebral lift that pairs well with creative work, social settings, or daytime productivity. The body baseline stays light and mobile — not couch-bound — making this a strong sativa-leaning option for users who want a high-velocity, mood-lifting cultivar. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: luscious ripe berry up front, with bright citrus through the middle and a satisfying herbal finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and refreshingly complex — a thoughtful flavor experience to match the visual presentation. The terpene profile reads berry-citrus-and-herb — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Bangkok Purple harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Bangkok Purple THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Bangkok Purple THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains.
